basic_details.job_title: IGRUA Store Keeper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi (IGRUA) has published the Store Keeper (Engineering) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Store Keeper (Engineering) position on a contractual basis. Candidates up to 55 years of age and holding a Diploma in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Mechanical Stream), Diploma in Aeronautical Engineering, or a Graduate degree in any discipline are eligible to apply via email. The application process is open until 25 July 2026, and candidates can access the official notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 55 years as on 01 July 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering in the Mechanical Stream from any DGCA approved AME Institute, Diploma in Aeronautical Engineering from any recognized Institute/College, Graduate in any discipline
qualification.details: Diploma in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering in the Mechanical Stream from any DGCA approved AME Institute OR Diploma in Aeronautical Engineering from any recognized Institute/College OR Graduate in any discipline

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Store Keeper (Engineering) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Store Keeper Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IGRUA Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IGRUA Store Keeper Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Store Keeper Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IGRUA Store Keeper (Engineering) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IGRUA Store Keeper Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IGRUA Store Keeper (Engineering) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Store Keeper (Engineering) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Store Keeper (Engineering) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Diploma in Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (Mechanical Stream), Diploma in Aeronautical Engineering, or a Graduate degree in any discipline.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Store Keeper (Engineering) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 55 years as of 1st July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Store Keeper (Engineering) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email with all required documents attached.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the IGRUA Store Keeper (Engineering) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the Indira Gandhi Rashtriya Uran Akademi located?
faq.answer: The academy is located in Amethi, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 229302.
